action_set_definitions.name: get_application_state
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the full current state of a specific zoning variance application, including the document vault, checklist, and metadata.

application_id.description: The unique identifier for the variance request (e.g., 'VAR-2024-SIG-042').

action_set_definitions.name: get_signage_reference_guide
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the official regulatory requirements for signage, including EMC luminance, dwell time, and Historic Overlay District constraints.

category.description: The specific section of the reference guide to retrieve.

action_set_definitions.name: verify_document_details
action_set_definitions.description: Extracts specific technical data (e.g., luminance, dwell time) from a document in the vault.

document_id.description: The ID of the document to inspect.

action_set_definitions.name: update_checklist_status
action_set_definitions.description: Updates the boolean status of a specific internal compliance checklist item.

item_key.description: The exact key name from the internal_compliance_checklist (e.g., 'neighbor_notification_sent').

action_set_definitions.name: sanitize_application_record
action_set_definitions.description: Filters the justification text to remove content-based speech or arguments, ensuring First Amendment compliance.

raw_text.description: The original justification text from the application.

example_output.sanitized_text: Requested variance is based on site visibility and physical property orientation.

action_set_definitions.name: advance_to_final_recommendation
action_set_definitions.description: Submits the final review report and moves the application to the 'Final Recommendation' workflow stage.

report_summary.description: Detailed report addressing EMC specs, site constraints, missing documents, and compliance.

state_description.application_id: Unique identifier for the zoning variance request.
state_description.applicant_info: Details about the person or entity applying.
state_description.property_metadata: Physical and legal characteristics of the property.
state_description.variance_details: The specific deviation from the code being requested.
state_description.document_vault: List of uploaded documents and their current verification status.
state_description.review_workflow_status: The current stage in the administrative pipeline (e.g., Intake, Technical Review, Public Notice, Board Hearing, Final Decision).
state_description.internal_compliance_checklist: Boolean flags for internal verification requirements.

variance_details.requested_reduction: Permission to install a 50 sq. ft. EMC monument sign with 4-second dwell time and 8,000 nits maximum daytime luminance.
variance_details.justification: The existing wall signage is completely obscured by mature street trees recently planted by the City Public Works department. Additionally, we need the high-frequency message changes to display movie trailers and daily concessions specials.
